views.createSql: CREATE VIEW `${VIEW_NAME}` AS SELECT extraDef.*, extraType.* FROM workExtrasDefinitions as extraDef LEFT JOIN workExtraTypes as extraType ON extraDef.weExtraTypeId = extraType.workExtraTypeId

CREATE VIEW `${VIEW_NAME}` AS SELECT extraType.*, extraDef.* FROM workExtraTypes as extraType LEFT JOIN workExtrasDefinitions as extraDef ON (workExtraTypeId = weExtraTypeId) WHERE wetAttachTo = 1 AND wetIsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY wetName COLLATE NOCASE
